data.title: TC Transcontinental completes sale of its Packaging Business to ProAmpac Holdings Inc.
data.description: Montreal, 6th March 2026—In recent news, Transcontinental Inc. (TSX: TCL.A TCL.B) has finalized the sale of its Packaging Business to ProAmpac Holdings Inc., with the deal amounting to $2.1 billion in cash proceeds. The Corporation, commonly known as TC Transcontinental, confirmed the completion of this transaction.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops 400 Points As Oil Prices Soar; Costco Climbs, Fertilizer Names Spike (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant drop of 400 points due to the sharp increase in oil prices. Additionally, a prominent retail company saw a drastic decline in its stock value. This news comes amidst live coverage highlighting the stock market's volatility, with Costco showing gains and fertilizer companies experiencing a spike in their stock prices.

data.title: NI Holdings, Inc. Reports Results for Fourth Quarter and Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Fargo, North Dakota, on March 06, 2026, NI Holdings, Inc. revealed its financial outcomes for the year concluding on December 31, 2025. The Company, identified as NI Holdings and traded on NASDAQ under the symbol NODK, provided an update on its performance.

data.title: Crescent Biopharma Announces Grants of Inducement Awards
data.description: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, on March 06, 2026, Crescent Biopharma, Inc. ("Crescent" or "the Company") (Nasdaq: CBIO), a clinical-stage biotech firm focused on advancing cancer treatments, disclosed that the independent Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the allocation of options allowing the purchase of a total of 45,675 shares of the Company's ordinary stock to two non-executive staff members as equity inducement prizes under the Crescent Biopharma, Inc. 2025 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan, recently updated (the "Inducement Plan"). Ratified on March 5, 2026, these options played a vital role in both employees' decision to join Crescent, complying with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: RBI Recommends Shareholders Reject NYSB's "Mini-tender Offer"
data.description: Restaurant Brands International Inc. has recently received an unsolicited mini-tender offer from New York Stock and Bond LLC to acquire approximately 0.03% of the company's shares, amounting to 100,000 RBI common shares. This offer has been made to RBI, traded under the symbols NYSE: QSR and TSX: QSR.

data.title: The Origin of Persistent Infrastructure Identity: Trevor Vick Introduces the Infrastructure Identity Layer for the Global Built Environment
data.description: A recent study conducted by UMIP Inc. introduces a novel framework aimed at providing infrastructure assets with an enduring digital identity throughout their lifespan. Revealed by Trevor Vick, the Founder of UMIP Inc., and the brain behind Persistent Infrastructure Identity, the innovative approach was unveiled on March 6, 2026, in Dallas.

data.title: DHT Holdings, Inc. announces delivery of VLCC newbuilding
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on March 6, 2026, DHT Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DHT) revealed the acquisition of its second VLCC newbuilding from Hanwha Ocean Co., Ltd. The vessel, named DHT Addax, is now operational in the spot market. This marks the second out of four VLCC newbuildings to be obtained by the Company in the initial half of 2026. These acquisitions are completely financed and expected to enhance the Company's services and revenue generation. The subsequent newbuilding is set to be received by the Company in late March 2026.
US bank deposits rose to $18.797 tln from $18.778 tln in the prior week.
US CENTCOM: The US Military has damaged or destroyed 43 Iranian warships so far.

data.title: BYD: Can Fast Chargers And 10 New Models Rescue Sales In China?
data.description: BYD shares in the U.S. increased by approximately 0.5% following the announcement of a new vehicle lineup. Concurrently, Asian-listed shares experienced a significant spike. The crucial question now is whether fast chargers and the introduction of 10 new models will revitalize sales in China for BYD.

data.title: Grammarly's AI tool, "Expert Review," offers writing feedback from deceased scholars, creating a unique writing perspective.
data.description: The AI-powered "Expert Review" feature by Grammarly provides feedback by incorporating perspectives of renowned writers and scholars, including those who have passed away.

data.title: Offerpad Receives Notice of Non-Compliance with NYSE Trading Share Price Listing Rule
data.description: In Tempe, Arizona, Offerpad Solutions Inc. revealed that it has been notified by the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) regarding non-compliance with Section 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This is due to the average closing price of the Company's Class A common stock falling below $1.00 for a continuous 30 trading-day period. Despite this, there will be no immediate delisting of the Company's Class A common stock from the NYSE. The Company's stock is listed under the symbol OPAD on the NYSE.

data.title: Conduent Appoints Greta Van to Board of Directors
data.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J.-- Conduent Incorporated revealed today that Greta Van has been appointed to its Board of Directors. With more than twenty years of leadership experience in finance, audit, enterprise risk management, and strategic operations in global publicly traded companies, Van currently holds the position of Chief Audit Executive at Jack Henry & Associates. Conduent Incorporated, listed as Nasdaq: CNDT, is a worldwide technology-focused business solutions company.

data.title: Vera Therapeutics gives out inducement grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: A new report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. The report also reveals that the economy added 210,000 new jobs last month, surpassing expectations. This marks the forty-sixth consecutive month of job growth in the country. Additionally, the average hourly earnings for workers have increased by 3.5% compared to last year. The strong job market and wage growth are seen as positive indicators for the overall economic health of the nation.
Panama Canal Authority: Transits increased 2.8% in first four months of fiscal year through January, with 4,156 in total.
